name: All Saints' Wake
description:
All Saints' Wake will soon begin in Eorzea! To celebrate the festivities, the city-states and residential districts will be decorated for the occasion and the Continental Circus will be making their appearance once more!
Read on for details.

name: Valentione's Day
description:
'Tis the season to share love of all kinds, and Lisette de Valentione and her associates aim to spread ardour and affection across Eorzea as only they can. As per custom, cities and residential areas the realm over will be bedecked with an impressive array of festive hearts that promise to put you in a rosy mood.
See the special site for details.
